empathetic_output.support_response: Can you please tell me more about what happened? When did you place your order and do you have any proof of purchase details handy? We will definitely work on getting this resolved for you as soon as possible so you can give your wife her special gift.

I would greatly appreciate it if you could look into this matter and provide a solution, thank you.
